languages.text: Жуткие звуки хрипло разрывают эфир. Офицеры на мостике затихают, слыша хныкающие стоны. Неизвестный не реагирует на человеческую речь.

traits.locale_text: Жуткие звуки хрипло разрывают эфир. Офицеры на мостике затихают, слыша хныкающие стоны. Неизвестный не реагирует на человеческую речь.

languages.text: Eerie sounds rip through the vox. The officers on the bridge fall silent as they listen to the whimpering moans. The unknown person does not respond to human speech.
languages.original_text: Жуткие звуки хрипло разрывают эфир. Офицеры на мостике затихают, слыша хныкающие стоны. Неизвестный не реагирует на человеческую речь.

traits.locale_text: Eerie sounds rip through the vox. The officers on the bridge fall silent as they listen to the whimpering moans. The unknown person does not respond to human speech.
Eerie sounds rip through the vox. The officers on the bridge fall silent as they listen to the whimpering moans. The unknown person does not respond to human speech.
Eerie sounds rip through the vox. The officers on the bridge fall silent as they listen to the whimpering moans. The unknown person does not respond to human speech.

languages.text: 诡异的声音撕裂了音阵。舰桥上的军官们沉默下来，听着那啜泣般的呻吟。这个来历不明的人对人类的语言毫无反应。
languages.original_text: Eerie sounds rip through the vox. The officers on the bridge fall silent as they listen to the whimpering moans. The unknown person does not respond to human speech.

traits.locale_text: 诡异的声音撕裂了音阵。舰桥上的军官们沉默下来，听着那啜泣般的呻吟。这个来历不明的人对人类的语言毫无反应。

languages.text: Unos sonidos inquietantes atraviesan el voco. Los oficiales del puente enmudecen mientras escuchan los gimoteos. El desconocido no responde al idioma humano.
languages.original_text: Eerie sounds rip through the vox. The officers on the bridge fall silent as they listen to the whimpering moans. The unknown person does not respond to human speech.

traits.locale_text: Unos sonidos inquietantes atraviesan el voco. Los oficiales del puente enmudecen mientras escuchan los gimoteos. El desconocido no responde al idioma humano.

languages.text: Des sons lugubres émergent du vox. Les officiers sur la passerelle se taisent alors que leur parviennent des gémissements plaintifs. La personne inconnue ne réagit pas au discours humain.
languages.original_text: Eerie sounds rip through the vox. The officers on the bridge fall silent as they listen to the whimpering moans. The unknown person does not respond to human speech.

traits.locale_text: Des sons lugubres émergent du vox. Les officiers sur la passerelle se taisent alors que leur parviennent des gémissements plaintifs. La personne inconnue ne réagit pas au discours humain.

languages.text: Vokstan ürkütücü sesler yükseliyor. Köprüdeki subaylar, iniltileri dinlerken sessizliğe gömülüyor. Bilinmeyen şey, insan konuşmasına tepki vermiyor.
languages.original_text: Eerie sounds rip through the vox. The officers on the bridge fall silent as they listen to the whimpering moans. The unknown person does not respond to human speech.

traits.locale_text: Vokstan ürkütücü sesler yükseliyor. Köprüdeki subaylar, iniltileri dinlerken sessizliğe gömülüyor. Bilinmeyen şey, insan konuşmasına tepki vermiyor.

languages.text: Aus dem Vox ertönen unheimliche Geräusche. Den Offizieren auf der Brücke stockt angesichts des wimmernden Stöhnens der Atem. Die unbekannte Person reagiert nicht auf menschliche Worte.
languages.original_text: Eerie sounds rip through the vox. The officers on the bridge fall silent as they listen to the whimpering moans. The unknown person does not respond to human speech.

traits.locale_text: Aus dem Vox ertönen unheimliche Geräusche. Den Offizieren auf der Brücke stockt angesichts des wimmernden Stöhnens der Atem. Die unbekannte Person reagiert nicht auf menschliche Worte.

languages.text: 奇妙な音声がヴォックスに響き渡る。ブリッジの乗組員は、悲鳴を上げる音に耳を傾け、沈黙する。未知の人物は、人間の言葉に反応しない。
languages.original_text: Eerie sounds rip through the vox. The officers on the bridge fall silent as they listen to the whimpering moans. The unknown person does not respond to human speech.

traits.locale_text: 奇妙な音声がヴォックスに響き渡る。ブリッジの乗組員は、悲鳴を上げる音に耳を傾け、沈黙する。未知の人物は、人間の言葉に反応しない。
